overview: Sir C R Reddy College of Engineering (SIRCRR), located in Eluru, Andhra Pradesh, is a well-established autonomous engineering institution known for its undergraduate and postgraduate programs in engineering, technology, and management. The college maintains consistent placement support through on-campus and pool-campus recruitment drives and operates with approved academic quality certifications.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Convenor Quota (Category A): Approximately ₹50,000 – ₹55,000 per year (~₹2.17 Lakhs total). Management Quota (Category B): Higher fee slabs depending on specialization demand, especially for Computer Science-related branches.

placements.totalOffers: Typically 450+ to 800+ selections depending on recruitment cycle
placements.companiesVisited: Accenture, Infosys, Wipro, TCS, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, HCL
placements.internationalOffers: No major international placement data publicly highlighted

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are primarily based on Andhra Pradesh state-level entrance examinations followed by centralized counseling for undergraduate and postgraduate programs.
admissions.importantDates: Admission schedules generally follow APSCHE counseling timelines for AP EAMCET, AP PGECET, and AP ICET.

campus.area: Engineering campus located in Eluru, Andhra Pradesh
campus.specialNote: Hostel and mess facilities are available with annual combined expenses typically ranging between ₹46,000 and ₹65,000 depending on accommodation type and mess usage.

hostel.hostelFee: ₹10,000 – ₹45,000 per year depending on room configuration

schemes.name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD)
schemes.benefit: Full tuition fee reimbursement for eligible Andhra Pradesh students.

schemes.name: Post-Matric Scholarships
schemes.benefit: Available for SC/ST/BC/EBC students under government eligibility norms.

schemes.name: AICTE Tuition Fee Waiver (TFW)
schemes.benefit: Limited tuition fee waiver seats for economically weaker students with family income below ₹8 LPA.

contact.address: Sir C. R. Reddy College of Engineering(A)ELURU-534007,ELURU(D.T).,A.P.
